entity.label: Eder
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A city in the south of Judah, on the border of Idumea (Josh. 15:21).

nodes.label: Eder
nodes.description: A city in the south of Judah, on the border of Idumea (Josh. 15:21).

verses.text: And the uttermost cities of the tribe of the children of Judah toward the coast of Edom southward were Kabzeel, and Eder, and Jagur,
